```{r}
#| label: tab-resistance-test-rate
#| tbl-cap: "Resistance test rates"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

data |>
    neoipcr::get_resistance_test_rate_table() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    i = dplyr::if_else(
      .data$type == "routine",
      0,
      2),
    r = dplyr::if_else(
      .data$type == "routine",
      .data$res,
      paste0("- ",.data$type)),
    .before = 1,
    .keep = "unused") |>
  gt(rowname_col = "r") |>
  sub_missing() |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "tested", decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width("r" ~ pct(40)) |>
  gt::tab_stub_indent(
    rows = gt::everything(),
    indent = gt::from_column(column = "i")
  ) |>
  cols_hide(columns = "i")
```
